description:
Replace emit/emitln with a ResolvingWriter that wraps the inner Writer (ColorWriter, PlainWriter, RawWriter) and resolves tokens in Write(). This moves token resolution from call sites into the Writer abstraction where it belongs.

- Add ResolvingWriter that calls ResolveTTY/ResolveMarkdown/passthrough based on mode, then delegates to inner Writer
- Compose in main.go: `w = ResolvingWriter(ColorWriter(os.Stdout, width))`
- Remove emit/emitln — all call sites become plain fmt.Fprint/fmt.Fprintf
- The Writer already knows its mode (IsTTY, IsRaw), so ResolvingWriter has everything it needs
title: Compose token resolution into Writer via ResolvingWriter wrapper
